scripts.dev:web: pnpm build:packages && tsx scripts/run-service.ts web dev
scripts.dev:server: pnpm build:packages && tsx scripts/run-service.ts server dev
scripts.dev:bot: pnpm build:packages && tsx scripts/run-service.ts mock-bot dev
scripts.release:prepare: pnpm check && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:pack && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:pack:verify && pnpm release:bundle
scripts.test:coverage: pnpm build:packages && vitest run --coverage.enabled true && node scripts/report-coverage.mjs
scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web build && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/web typecheck && pnpm --filter @voicyclaw/mock-bot typecheck
scripts.plugin:voicyclaw:check: pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:install && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:lint && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:test && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:typecheck
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm typecheck && pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:check && pnpm build
scripts.ci:quality: pnpm plugin:voicyclaw:check && pnpm lint && pnpm test:coverage && pnpm typecheck
scripts.ci:e2e: pnpm db:generate && pnpm db:push && pnpm test:e2e
